data.title: OKX officially becomes the first global crypto exchange to obtain MiCA license and operate in Europe
data.description:
Odaily Planet Daily News According to official news, OKX announced that it has officially become the first global cryptocurrency exchange to obtain a MiCA license and conduct business in Europe. This is an important milestone for OKX and the entire European Economic Area (EEA) crypto industry. Currently, OKX now provides compliant and localized cryptocurrency services to more than 400 million users in 28 countries in the European Economic Area (EEA) through its European headquarters in Malta. Whether users are in France, Germany, Spain, or other member states, they can easily use OKX's cutting-edge crypto products, supporting local payment methods and multiple fiat currency options.
Star posted on the X platform that "OKX is now officially launched in 28 European Economic Area (EEA) countries and complies with MiCA regulations. Compliance and supervision are crucial, and we are committed to providing users with a safe, transparent, and fully compliant trading experience. By supporting euro trading pairs, free bank transfers, and localized services, we make cryptocurrency trading more convenient. In the future, we will continue to optimize our products and services, enhance user experience, and allow every user to easily enjoy the Web3 world."

data.title: A whale deposited another 4 million USDC into Hyperliquid to go long on SOL
data.description: Odaily Planet Daily News According to Lookonchain monitoring, as the price of SOL fell, a whale continued to deposit 4 million USDC into Hyperliquid to continue to go long on SOL. The whale had previously accumulated a loss of $6.9 million on long positions in BTC, ETH, and SOL (including funding fees).

data.title: Robinhood plans to launch cryptocurrency service in Singapore this year via Bitstamp
data.description: Odaily Planet Daily News: Johann Kerbrat, vice president and general manager of the cryptocurrency department of Robinhood Markets Inc., said that the company plans to launch cryptocurrency services in Singapore by the end of 2025 through its recently acquired European digital asset exchange Bitstamp Ltd. The plan will be carried out under the guidance of local regulators, which is also an important step in Robinhood's expansion strategy in the Asia-Pacific region. (Bloomberg)

data.title: Phishing Alert Issued for Four.Meme Search Results
data.description: According to Odaily, Scam Sniffer has issued a warning on the X platform regarding a phishing link that appears when searching for 'Four Meme' on Google. The fraudulent link impersonates the official platform of Four.Meme, which is a meme launch platform on the BNB Chain.

data.title: The FTX liquidation address transferred 572.656 SOL to a Binance deposit address
data.description: Odaily Planet Daily News According to Arkham monitoring, the FTX liquidation address transferred 572.656 SOL to the Binance deposit address 40 minutes ago, equivalent to US$94,390. The current balance in the FTX liquidation address is US$4,181,628.08.

data.title: JPMorgan Chase study shows Trump's offensive social media posts are declining
data.description: Odaily Planet Daily News: According to JPMorgan research, the number of market-impacting social media posts posted by Trump has decreased significantly since he returned to power. Compared to his first term, only 10% of Trump’s 126 posts on sensitive topics such as trade tariffs, foreign relations and the economy led to noticeable currency market moves, although that proportion is rising. The report pointed out that Trump recently posted more than 20 related posts, which was twice the average in January, but far lower than the peak of 60 posts per week during the trade friction period of 2018-2019. Posts about tariffs had the biggest impact on markets, with nearly a third of posts causing market moves, JPMorgan said. Among them, Trump posted in early February that he had used emergency powers to impose a 25% tariff on Mexico and Canada, although he postponed the measure two days later, causing the Mexican peso and Canadian dollar to fall by more than 2% and 1%, respectively. Analysts at JPMorgan said trading on Trump’s tweets was not highly profitable, with backtesting showing expected gains of no more than 4% even under a “very optimistic” scenario. (Golden Ten)

data.title: Scam Sniffer: Beware of phishing links that appear when you search for "Four Meme" on Google
data.description: Odaily Planet Daily News Scam Sniffer issued a warning on the X platform, saying that currently when searching for "Four Meme" on Google, phishing links pretending to be the official platform of Four.Meme will appear. It is reported that Four.Meme is the Meme launch platform on BNB Chain.

data.title: El Salvador Increases Bitcoin Purchases Amid Strategic Discussions
data.description:
According to BlockBeats, monitoring data from spotonchain indicates that since December 22, 2024, the government of El Salvador has intensified its Bitcoin acquisitions, purchasing a total of 93.417 BTC at an average price of $98,579. The daily purchase volume ranges from 1 to 11 BTC, with the country currently buying approximately 1.6 BTC per day.

El Salvador's current Bitcoin holdings amount to 6,081 BTC, valued at approximately $579.9 million.

Previously, on February 14, BlockBeats reported that El Salvador's President Nayib Bukele met with Michael Saylor, the founder of Strategy (formerly MicroStrategy), at the presidential palace to discuss Bitcoin-related topics.

data.title: The Long/Short Ratio for The BTC/USDT Perpetual Contract is 2.22, Funding Rate at 0.0074%
data.description: According to Binance market data, the long/short ratio for BTC/USDT perpetual contracts is 2.22, with Long dominating. Currently, the funding rate is 0.0074%.The long/short ratio and funding rate are key market sentiment indicators in futures trading.

data.title: Analyst: Chinese AI models such as DeepSeek have caused investors to reassess their optimism about China’s AI growth and economic benefits
data.description: Odaily Planet Daily News: Meng Lei, a Chinese equity strategy analyst at UBS Securities, said that the Chinese stock market faces three new narratives in the new year, the first of which is "DeepSeek and China's innovation spark". He said that China's domestically produced AI large models have achieved the level of similar world-leading large models at a lower cost, making Chinese innovation return to the vision of global investors. The second narrative that is beneficial to the stock market is "all-round policy easing to help valuation reconstruction." In addition, Meng Lei also said that this year the Chinese stock market is facing a third new narrative - the risk of renewed trade frictions between China and the United States. (Yicai Global)
